scope.target: Validate and close the repository pattern standards alignment workflow
scope.dependency_radius: All files changed by the workflow
constraints: All implementation tasks must be completed or explicitly deferred
Do not claim closure with unresolved contradictory active guidance
Record skipped validation and residual risk
non_goals: No new architecture decisions during final validation

inputs.architecture_target: A validated, internally consistent repository pattern rule family

steps: Record residual risks and deferred work
validation: Repository rule searches match approved decisions
Changed scripts pass syntax and focused behavior checks

results.summary: Validated and closed the repository pattern alignment workflow. Canonical standards, dependent AI context, examples, DBA1001 semantic enforcement, and retired-script ownership now agree. Expected legacy terms remain only in explicit prohibition, rationale, target-specific batch guidance, archive capability guidance, or analyzer regression tests.
tests_run: parsed all eight workflow task JSON files
validated relative Markdown links in 51 workflow-changed Markdown files
Git Bash syntax validation for check-all.sh, check-coding-standards.sh, code-review.sh, and generate-check-scripts-from-md.sh
parse-md-rules.py AST syntax validation and repository-standards exclusion behavior check
targeted searches for retired repository scripts and legacy repository method/name references
